  "society_power": 7.0,

  "key_event": "Allied invasion and abdication of Reza Shah in 1941.",
  "reasoning": "The collapse of Reza Shah's despotic state after the 1941 Allied invasion created a power vacuum, allowing for an explosive resurgence of civil society (parties, press, unions). Although the state began a slow recovery after resolving the Azerbaijan crisis, it remained weak and was consistently constrained by this newly empowered, pluralistic society.",
